description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Alabama ( , AL-ə-BAM-ə) is a state in the Southeastern and Deep Southern regions of the United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Iowa (  EYE-ə-wə) is a landlocked state in the upper Midwestern region of the United States.

surface_forms: My mother and father were from Puerto Rico
aliases: Free Associated State of Puerto Rico
description: unincorporated territory of the United States of America
description_wiki: Puerto Rico (abbreviated PR), officially the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, is a self-governing Caribbean archipelago and island organized as an unincorporated territory of the United States under the designation of commonwealth.

surface_forms: New York was a bad place
aliases: The City So Nice They Named It Twice
description: most populous city in the United States
description_wiki: New York, often called New York City (NYC), is the most populous city in the United States.
